sentence: 这家航空公司的服务非常好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā hángkōng gōngsī de fúwù fēicháng hǎo.

meaning: 1. to include (in a collection); 2. to put together (stories, poems et
sentence: 这本词典收录了五万个词条。
pinyin: Zhè běn cídiǎn shōulùle wǔwàn gè cítiáo.
english: This dictionary includes fifty thousand entries.

sentence: 买蔬菜前要检查有没有残余农药。
pinyin: Mǎi shūcài qián yào jiǎnchá yǒu méiyǒu cányú nóngyào.
english: Before buying vegetables, check whether there are pesticide residues.

sentence: 池塘里的死水散发出一股异味。
pinyin: Chítáng lǐ de sǐshuǐ sànfā chū yī gǔ yìwèi.
english: The stagnant water in the pond gives off an unpleasant smell.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了古代战场上使用的军马装备。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le gǔdài zhànchǎng shàng shǐyòng de jūn mǎ zhuāngbèi.
english: The museum displayed equipment used on warhorses in ancient battles.
